$comment: profile_signals sub-schema — the signals Phase 1 extracts from every patient message. This is a subset of the full Phase 1 output schema (phase1_output_schema.json). Used by: (1) validate_phase1_output() in phase1_schema.py, (2) signal_writer.py to write to Neon DB users table, (3) Phase 2 build_enriched_query() to read stored signals.

diabetes_type.description: Diabetes type inferred from this message. Empty string if not mentioned in this message. The signal_writer applies a one-way upgrade: null → suspected → prediabetes → T1DM / T2DM / GDM. It never downgrades a stored value.
diabetes_type.$merge_rule: one-way upgrade only — see DIABETES_TYPE_UPGRADE_ORDER in signal_writer.py

medications_mentioned.description: Medications mentioned or implied in this message, mapped to controlled vocabulary. Empty array if none. Patient language: 'white tablet' → oral_antidiabetic_unspecified; 'night injection' → insulin_basal; 'cholesterol tablet' → statin_unspecified.
medications_mentioned.$merge_rule: append only — new terms added, existing never removed, no duplicates

insulin_user.description: True if patient mentions injection or insulin in this message. False if not mentioned this message. The signal_writer stores True permanently — once True is stored, it is never reset to False regardless of future messages.
insulin_user.$merge_rule: latch True only — DB value is OR of stored and incoming: new_value = stored OR incoming

condition_flags.description: Condition flags detected in this message. These trigger Tier 2 RAG sources. Permanent once stored — medical conditions do not disappear. If patient later denies a flag, bot asks a re-confirmation question rather than clearing the flag (see BOT_CONVERSATION_ARCHITECTURE.md Section 9.2).

complications_mentioned.description: Complications mentioned or implied in this message. Controlled vocabulary only. Note: erectile_dysfunction_mentioned is stored but NEVER surfaced in patient-facing responses — it is for clinical profile completeness and lead scoring only.
complications_mentioned.$merge_rule: append only, no duplicates — complications are not removed once detected

location_hint.description: City or district in Kerala mentioned in this message. Empty string if not mentioned. The signal_writer overwrites the stored value only if the new value is more specific (city > district > state). If the patient says 'Thrissur district' and later says 'Chalakudy', the more specific value wins.
location_hint.$merge_rule: overwrite if new value is more specific — specificity heuristic: len(new) >= len(stored) OR stored is empty. Same-length names overwrite (e.g. 'Thrissur' → 'Chalakudy') to prefer the most recently stated specific location.

session_context.description: Who is asking. self = patient asking about their own condition. family_member_inquiry = asking about a relative's diabetes. SESSION-ONLY — NOT written to the users table. Used within the current session to frame Phase 2's response (answer as if the relative is the patient).
session_context.$merge_rule: not persisted — session memory only, cleared at session end
